Sync Conflict
Offline changes to “” conflict with the latest synced version. Choose how to resolve. Closing this dialog keeps both copies by saving the server version as a new document.

Room Manager
SHOWING:
Create, rename, recolor, and reorder workspaces. Deleting moves its rooms to Unlabeled.
Explore Rooms
Rooms in the connected database. Pick a workspace and add to subscribe — the list stays open so you can add several.
Manage Storage
Select rooms to clear from offline storage (cache, sync base and snapshots together). Synced content reloads from the server when you next open the room.
Download as
Choose a file extension or type your own filename.
Snapshots
Local version history for this document. Snapshots are taken automatically every few minutes (and before risky actions) — restore any of them below. Restoring saves the current text first, so nothing is lost.
